title: Police Seize ₹2.27 Crore Cash From Pastor’s House In Narsapuram
description: Narsapuram Rural circle inspector G. Durga Prasad and sub-inspector T.V. Suresh Babu said they received information that the pastor’s son-in-law Samson is bringing unaccounted cash of ₹50 lakh to Lakshmaneswaram village from Hyderabad.
